name: @z80020100/claude-code-statusline
description: Custom status line for Claude Code — model info, context usage gradient bar, token stats, cost, git status, and rate limits

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test
scripts.fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format:fix
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:sh && npm run lint:yml
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:js && npm run format:check:sh
scripts.format:fix: npm run format:fix:js && npm run format:fix:sh
scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
  Run setup to configure Claude Code automatically:
    claude-code-statusline setup
')"

author: Cliff Wu <z800201002005@gmail.com>
